svg.text: NEW ACCOUNTS: 5 listings/day first week. 10/day second week. Scale from there.
MARGIN TARGET: 30-50% (higher than eBay due to local demand)
Price: slightly below retail, room to negotiate
PRO TIP: Start local-only. Add shipping after 20+ sales and
positive reviews. Reduces risk and builds reputation faster.
Use different pickup locations to reach more buyers
Delete and relist for fresh algorithm boost
Holidays, back to school, summer, tax refund season
"Buy 2, get 10% off" - increases average order value
In Search Of posts reveal what buyers want
Take your own or use supplier lifestyle images
No weapons, supplements, alcohol, tobacco, animals
Manual listing only. FB detects bots aggressively.
Response time affects ranking and badge status
IF BANNED: Appeal immediately. Create new account on different
device/IP. Never reuse same photos or descriptions.
DAILY TARGET: 10 new listings, 5 renewed, 100% message response
Consistency beats intensity. Show up every day.
"Hi! Yes, still available. When works best for pickup?"
"I can do [price] if you can pick up today."
"Shipped items include tracking. I'll send it within 24hrs."
Views per listing | Messages received | Sell-through rate
Start local. Scale shipped. Reinvest profits. Stay consistent.
